## Description

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation / Refactor / Tests

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass (`npm test`)
- [ ] No TypeScript errors (`npm run typecheck`)
- [ ] Linting passes (`npm run lint`)
- [ ] Commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
